hero.title: Engineering Zero-Contamination Process Glass & PTFE Systems
hero.desc: Shree Sai Scientific manufactures low-expansion borosilicate glass 3.3 columns, reactor vessels, and custom fluoropolymer systems engineered to the world's most rigorous chemical safety standards.

divisions.title: Engineered Product Divisions
divisions.desc: Discover our divisions offering high-purity glass and fluoropolymer solutions for research and production scales.
divisions.glassDesc: Corrosion-resistant column structures, shell & tube heat exchangers, and glass vessel assemblies engineered for visual process validation up to 200°C.
divisions.ptfeDesc: High-density lined process pipes, stirring impellers, and custom-machined PTFE seals resistant to highly aggressive chemical media.
divisions.turnkeyDesc: Complete, pre-engineered modular units containing reaction vessels, structural support frames, thermal control units, and digital automation tools.
